falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below the August 2024 swing low equivalent would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as the historical bottom held above that structural support; this would signal continuation lower not bottoming

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28 and rapidly mean-reverting; sustained VIX above 35 indicates systemic stress incompatible with the bottom_2024_aug regime, proving this is a higher-volatility breakdown scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with yields stable-to-higher; a sharp flight-to-quality bid in bonds would signal recession/deleveraging panic rather than the soft-landing bottom pattern, invalidating the macro setup

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
